lines: Eve’s return shelf holds sealed letters beside worn tokens. Several empty spaces remain free of dust.
"Name first. Hope can wait until I know which box to open."

choices.label: Ask what comes back from placements
Ask why the shelf stands at the old gates

lines: "Admitted people send letters when they can write, and employers sometimes send pay tokens. A uniform notice comes when neither happens."
"Families leave a space because an empty shelf feels too much like judgment."

choices.label: Ask why the shelf stands at the old gates

lines: "Admitted people last stood with their households at these gates."
"A letter should return to the point where the road divided them."
